label: No Sovereignty
description: The cloud service does not meet any sovereignty criteria. Fundamental controls over data, operations, and legal exposure are absent.

label: Basic Sovereignty
description: Minimal sovereignty controls are in place. Core data residency and basic contractual protections exist but operational and legal independence is limited.

label: Substantial Sovereignty
description: Significant sovereignty controls are implemented. Data residency, access controls, and key contractual protections are in place, with some operational independence.

label: High Sovereignty
description: Comprehensive sovereignty controls are implemented. Strong data, operational, and legal independence with robust mechanisms to resist extraterritorial interference.

label: Full Digital Sovereignty
description: Maximum sovereignty controls are in place. Complete data, operational, and legal independence with verified resistance to extraterritorial access and full auditability.
